demo.title: Welcome to your demo workspace
demo.subtitle: Get a feel for our platform by exploring live metrics and simulating team collaboration in a sandbox environment.

metrics.title: Simulate email volume
metrics.description: Generate simulated email traffic over the last 30 days to see how delivery rates, bounces, and charts update in real time.

impersonation.title: Test team roles
impersonation.description: Switch sessions with other teammates instantly to preview different workspace permissions (Admin vs. Member).

retroDialog.title: Simulate send history
retroDialog.description: Choose how many emails to backfill and the time window. After confirming, Metrics refreshes with the simulated volume. Sends respect your plan limits.

impersonationDialog.title: Sign in as member
impersonationDialog.description: Demo only: pick an active workspace member to switch the session. Invited or suspended members are listed but cannot be selected.
impersonationDialog.noMembers: No active members in this workspace yet. Invite someone from Settings → Members first.
